title: waltheria fauriei
intro: Waltheria fauriei, also known as Fauriei Waltheria or Korean Waltheria, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae, native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Waltheria fauriei are said to include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Waltheria fauriei is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to be consumed, and sometimes its roots are used in traditional herbal preparations, although its availability and usage may vary depending on the region.
